arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers reveals his unseen exchange with Rangers boss Barry Ferguson after Celtic boss met rival in stands
arts.sum: The Hoops boss held court as he gears up for the final Old Firm showdown of the season

arts.ttl: Graeme Souness throws mega money case study at Rangers takeover kings with his £50m masterplan now ready for Celtic
arts.sum: Andrew Cavenagh and 49ers Enterprises are set to take control at Ibrox in the coming weeks

arts.ttl: What chances a Rangers guard of honour for Celtic?
arts.sum: Rangers do not plan to give Celtic a guard of honour in the visitors' first game after retaining the Scottish title, but what are the thoughts of the respective managers?

arts.ttl: Barry Ferguson plans private Celtic mark of respect as Rangers guard of honour stance made crystal clear
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers admitted on Friday that he would like Gers to respect the title win but Fergie has ruled that out

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers takes a dig at Rangers over guard of honour as Celtic boss admits it's tough for perennial runners-up
arts.sum: The Hoops head to the home of their bitter rivals with the title already wrapped up
